title: Update EDHOC test vectors, test functions, and interop verification in edhoc.rs
description: Update test functions at bottom of edhoc.rs (~1559+), rfc9529_signature_trace_vectors etc. to use fixed helpers. Add/verify test vectors against python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py. Ensure all paths match per test integrity rules - independent oracle, no hardcoded from Rust impl. Run cargo test after.
